title: SICP 4.3 ambeval evaluator and driver
goal: Add tests/sicp/ch4_amb_evaluator.esk covering the book's ambeval evaluator and driver-loop semantics, not only direct CPS amb combinators.
acceptance: ICC observes sicp_ch4_amb_evaluator_r and sicp_ch4_amb_evaluator_aot PASS
ux_payoff: Makes nondeterministic evaluation SICP-faithful instead of only capability-equivalent.
